summary.intent: Implement 6 fixes identified in a 'pass 5' code review of the carousel component, covering swipe gesture guards, slides_per_move step size, focus-scroll visibility checks, controlled-mode index round-tripping, hover pause gating, and loop control disabling.
summary.outcome: All 6 fixes were implemented and verified: 126 tests pass, clippy clean, spec synced, xci-fast gate green, committed and pushed.

repo: Controlled value round-trip convention follows Slider's pattern: a `Bindable` field pairs with `on_value_change: Option<Callback<...>>` + `Effect::ValueChange` fired on change; adapter resolves it by calling the callback and the parent pushes the new value back via `set_props`.
The `cargo xci-fast` command is the pre-push CI gate for this repo.
Spec and implementation are kept in strict sync — spec lives at `spec/components/layout/carousel.md` and must be updated for every behavioral change.
Test helpers that fire `pending_effects` use `Arc<Mutex<Vec>>` + a no-op `StrongSend`; pattern established by slider tests.
Pass-N review cycles are tracked as numbered Codex threads; each pass produces a verdict, replies are posted per-thread, and the next pass is re-triggered after commit.

code.finding: PointerUp was missing a no-drag guard (Q1) and was not honoring `slides_per_move` for step size (Q2); both were fixed in the same rewrite of that arm.
FocusSlide was unconditionally scrolling even when the target slide was already visible (Q3); fix adds a visibility check before navigating.

Added `Effect::IndexChange` variant, `on_index_change: Option<Callback<usize>>` Props field, and `index_change_effect` helper; wired into AutoPlayTick, PointerUp, and FocusSlide (Q4 controlled round-trip).
Added `HoverStart`/`HoverEnd` event variants with transition arms gated by `pause_on_hover`, plus `on_root_pointer_enter`/`on_root_pointer_leave` Api handlers (Q5).
`can_go_prev`/`can_go_next` were not returning `false` when `last_index() == 0`; fixed so loop controls are disabled on single-slide carousels (Q6).

Spec had internal contradiction: `AutoPlayPause` was documented as the hover/focus pause mechanism while `FocusSlide` separately gated `pause_on_focus`; resolved by reframing `AutoPlayPause` as the manual pause and making hover/focus symmetric core events.

workflow: When a spec is internally contradictory on an architectural decision, block on user input via `AskUserQuestion` rather than picking arbitrarily — the user resolved the Q5 ambiguity in one round.
After adding a new effect variant, existing tests that assert exact `pending_effects` contents will fail and need assertion updates — treat this as expected churn, not regressions.
Clippy nits (collapsible `if`, let-return in test helpers) caught post-implementation; worth a clippy pass before the final test run.

friction: Two previously-passing swipe tests had exact `pending_effects` assertions that broke when `IndexChange` was added to navigation paths — required manual assertion updates.
Two clippy warnings (collapsible `if` in PointerUp arm, let-return in test helper) required separate fix edits after the main implementation.
Spec ambiguity in Q5 (`AutoPlayPause` dual-documented as both hover-pause and manual-pause) required a user decision before implementation could proceed.
open_items: Q5 `pause_on_hover`/`pause_on_focus` architectural decision was resolved by user choice of 'core hover events (symmetric)' — downstream adapters will need to wire `on_root_pointer_enter`/`leave` to actual DOM pointer events.
Pass-6 Codex review not yet triggered at transcript end — pending after commit/push and thread replies.
